productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Meztli Brown Casual Shoe
description: This buckaroo men Meztli Brown Casual shoe is the essence of the brand's signature rugged style. True to its origin from the Mexican plains, this shoe is the essence of the man-about-town nonchalance. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with its stitch detailing and rivets. Pair it with distressed jeans, casual check shirt and a tonal belt to subtly recapture the masculine style of the Wild West. Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Contrasting leather overlay on the midfoot and heel for better support Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Rivets in the midfoot area Lightly padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug fit Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Well-cushioned nubuck footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers Outsole Slip-resistant PU outsole for better shock absorption and grip Textured grooves on the outsole for enhanced traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
